title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - FreeCharge - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
